general.title: General
general.description: Organization-wide key/value settings — session defaults, security toggles, and other tunables consumed across the platform.
general.liveOnly: General settings are live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage passkeys (WebAuthn) for passwordless, phishing-resistant sign-in to your account.
security.liveOnly: Passkey management is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.
security.addPasskeyHint: Register this device’s authenticator (Touch ID, Windows Hello, a security key, or your phone).

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: White-label the portal and login screen with your product name, logo, colors, and custom CSS.
branding.liveOnly: Branding is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.

banners.title: Banners
banners.description: Compliance banners and forensic watermarks shown over sessions, scoped to a workspace, group, or user.
banners.liveOnly: Banners are live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.
banners.empty: No banner or watermark configs yet.

fields.targetId: Target ID (optional — blank = all in scope)

toasts.missingText: Provide a banner text or watermark text

licensing.title: Licensing
licensing.description: Enforce concurrent-session or named-user limits across the organization. Enforcement runs at session launch.
licensing.liveOnly: Licensing is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.

database.title: Database
database.description: Automated pg_dump backups with retention. Trigger an on-demand backup or review the backup history.
database.liveOnly: Database backups are live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.

toasts.failedDescription: pg_dump did not complete — check server logs

config.title: Config Import / Export
config.description: Export portable branding and settings as JSON, and re-import them into another deployment. Secrets and identities are never included.
config.liveOnly: Config import/export is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.
config.exportHint: Download the current org branding and general settings as a JSON file.
config.importHint: Paste a config JSON or upload a file, then apply.
